title: bupleurum longicaule var. hazaricum
intro: Bupleurum longicaule var. hazaricum, also known as Huzhang or Chinese Thorowax, is a medicinal plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Bupleurum longicaule var. hazaricum have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating liver and kidney issues, and boosting the immune system. Bupleurum longicaule var. hazaricum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, decoctions, and capsules, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
